theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) mixed with Archetype 5 (Cinematic Luxury)
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Premium, trustworthy, calm, minimal, cinematic. No visual clutter.

rules.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-medium

typography.instructions: DO NOT use Inter or generic sans for headings. Use 'Satoshi' (or Outfit as fallback). Wise-inspired functional hierarchy: large headings, wide spacing, strong readability. Only left-align or occasionally center-align specific blocks.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_system: Generous spacing. Follow a 4px foundational scale (e.g. 8px, 16px, 24px, 32px, 64px, 128px) inspired by Wise Design.
layout_and_spacing.grid: Bento-style grids for Process and Portfolio. Gap-6 or Gap-8 for breathing room.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Minimal. 1px subtle borders (rgba(255,255,255,0.1) in dark mode). Soft diffuse shadows. No heavy gradients.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling is MANDATORY. Implement in layout.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Magnetic hover effect on primary buttons. Image/Video posters slightly scale up (1.02) on hover with an extended duration (0.6s ease).
motion_and_interactions.reveal: Subtle fade-up and slide-up reveals on scroll using Framer Motion.
motion_and_interactions.theme_toggle: Smooth crossfade on theme toggle. Use Framer Motion for the toggle icon.
motion_and_interactions.cursor: Optional: very subtle custom cursor dot that inverts color against background, or just default clean cursor. Do not over-engineer.

custom_components.name: MagneticButton
custom_components.description: A button that slightly pulls towards the cursor on hover using framer-motion.

custom_components.name: VideoPortfolioCard
custom_components.description: Hover to play preview. Dark sleek border. Hidden captions that slide up.

custom_components.name: NoiseBackground
custom_components.description: A fixed SVG noise/grain overlay for the cinematic feel.

sections.description: Massive clean typography: 'Turning raw clips into mini masterpieces.' Sticky 'Let's Talk' CTA. Smooth scroll indicator. Subtle animated CSS grain background.
sections.instructions: Do not use a video background. Use a pure dark background with an SVG noise overlay and a very soft radial gradient (accent color #163300 at 10% opacity) in the center/top.

sections.description: Minimal paragraph design. Short intro, craftsmanship philosophy. Left-aligned, max-width prose.
Grid layout. Cinematic spacing. Cards have video poster images. On hover, they simulate a video playing or show a 'Play' icon. Minimal captions.
3-step timeline or sleek cards: 1. Strategy, 2. Edit & Motion, 3. Final Polish. Use large typography numbers (01, 02, 03).
One minimal card/section for 'Custom Pricing - Tailored to every project'. Minimal CTA.
Expandable Shadcn accordion. Clean motion, minimal UI. 1px borders.
Premium minimalist form (Shadcn Form/Input). Options for Email, WhatsApp, Discord, IG. Large headings.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme as default. Ensure smooth toggling to light theme.
Use standard HTML tags and Tailwind classes for complex overlapping marketing layouts instead of Shadcn Cards.
Create an SVG noise overlay (base64 or direct SVG in React) for the Hero background to avoid flat colors, making it cinematic.
Implement Lenis smooth scrolling in the main layout.
Never use Inter for headings. Use 'Satoshi' or 'Cabinet Grotesk' via font-face or next/font (or standard google fonts like Outfit/Manrope).
Ensure the accent colors #163300 and #9FE870 are used elegantly. For instance, in dark mode, a button background of #9FE870 with text #163300 provides high contrast and a premium look.
DO NOT add fake metrics or fake client logos. Keep it minimalist.
Create separate /contact page, utilizing framer-motion for smooth routing transitions.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements MUST have role-based kebab-case data-testid attributes.
